---
title: "Role-Based Permissions"
labels: [enhancement]
---

## Feature
Implement user roles (student, club leader, teacher, admin) with permissions for each action (e.g., only leaders can manage members, only teachers can approve activities).

## Why
To prevent unauthorized actions and support realistic school workflows.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Roles are assigned to users
- Permissions enforced in backend and UI
- Only authorized users can perform sensitive actions
